display.purpose: Hero headline only. Gloock in Forest Deep. One element per viewport. Surrounded by silence.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Gloock in Forest Deep. Same weight as Display, smaller scale.

body.purpose: All prose. Bitter in Ancient Earth. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Wide-tracked uppercase tags. Bitter in Teal. Sparingly — 3-4 instances max per page.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: The one permitted shadow. Floating or popped states only. Never decorative.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Standard easing for all entrance animations. Fast out, slow settle.

motion.name: duration-entrance
motion.purpose: Fade-up entrance duration for hero elements.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Button hover, link hover, color transitions.

motion.name: stagger-unit
motion.purpose: Delay increment for staggered entrance sequences. Steps: 80ms, 180ms, 280ms, 380ms, 480ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Salmon fill, Ancient Earth text, 4px radius. Warm and inviting, not aggressive.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: oklch(75% 0.11 42); color: oklch(20% 0.02 58); font-family: 'Bitter', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.025em; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 4px; border: none; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(68% 0.11 42); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.09 198); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Link
components.description: Secondary text-only action. Ancient Earth at 60% opacity, transitions to full Earth on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; color: oklch(20% 0.02 58 / 60%); font-family: 'Bitter', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.025em; text-decoration: none; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(20% 0.02 58); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.09 198); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Minimal two-element nav. Brand name in Forest Deep (cool botanical) left, 'Healer' in warm Earth/50 right. The Forest name signals the grove from the first moment.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 24px 64px; background: oklch(96% 0.018 82); } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Gloock', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(38% 0.07 170); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: 'Bitter', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(20% 0.02 58 / 50%); letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-nav { padding: 20px 32px; } }

components.name: Label Tag
components.description: Wide-tracked uppercase Bitter in Teal. Used for 'Healing · Grounding · Presence' and similar categorical tags.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'Bitter', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(52% 0.09 198); letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0; }

components.name: Botanical Sprig
components.description: Signature SVG illustration. Set at 20% Teal for hero. Hand-drawn botanical quality, the whimsy anchor of the system.
components.css: .ds-sprig-wrap { color: oklch(52% 0.09 198 / 20%); width: 160px; pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .ds-sprig-wrap svg { width: 100%; height: auto; }

narrative.overview:
Earthy and botanical at the foundation — warm parchment, forest-teal headings, Bitter body text on a sun-warmed page — but inhabited by a quiet magic that reveals itself in small moments. This is not the loud new-age aesthetic: no purple gradients, no crystal imagery, no wellness-influencer pastels. It is the older kind of magic: the kind that lives in forests, in hand-thrown pottery, in the way late-afternoon light hits warm paper.

Tara-Maria's personal flair (mermaids, unicorns, the fantastical tucked inside the earthy) surfaces not in literal imagery but in the character of the details. A color that surprises you. An animation that lingers a beat. A botanical illustration that feels slightly more alive than expected.

Both typefaces are serifs. Gloock in Forest brings cool, editorial gravity. Bitter in Earth brings slab warmth. The cool/warm temperature contrast between them is the typographic heartbeat of the system.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, unhurried, quiet — presence before polish
Botanical and earthy with water-cool headings and warm body text
Strong sectional rhythm; one idea per section
Both display and body in serif: an unusual, committed pairing
Plum held in reserve as the magic color

rules.name: The Plum Rule
rules.body: Plum is never a layout color. Never background, never body text, never border. One element, smaller than 2% of any surface. Its rarity is the entire point.

rules.name: The No-True-Black Rule
rules.body: #000 and oklch(0% 0 0) are prohibited. The darkest value is Ancient Earth oklch(20% 0.02 58). Nothing goes darker.

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: Warm register (parchment, sand, earth, cream) = backgrounds and body text. Cool register (forest, teal) = headings and accents. Never swap accidentally.

rules.name: The Serif Commitment Rule
rules.body: No sans-serif in this system. Every typographic element uses Gloock or Bitter. The two-serif combination is the signature.

rules.name: The Color-to-Font Rule
rules.body: Gloock = Forest Deep. Bitter = Ancient Earth (body) or Teal (labels). Reversing these pairings breaks the design logic.

rules.name: The Display Restraint Rule
rules.body: Display scale (clamp 3rem to 6.5rem) appears on at most one element per viewport. Its size works because it is surrounded by silence.

rules.name: The Flat-and-Warm Rule
rules.body: If a surface needs a shadow to feel distinct, the problem is color or spacing. Fix those instead. One exception: ambient-lift for floating/popped states only.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color values. The palette is OKLCH-native.
Do render Gloock headings in Forest Deep. The cool/warm typographic contrast is the system signature.
Do give every section strong breathing room. One idea per section, generous whitespace.
Do use Salmon for primary CTAs. Warm, inviting, never aggressive.
Do hold Plum in strict reserve. One element, under 2% of surface, never expected.
Do let Tara-Maria's personality be center. The about page is where the mermaids and unicorns live.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. All animations must be gated.
Do keep body line length at 65-75ch.
donts: Don't use sans-serif fonts. The two-serif commitment is the signature.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Prohibited.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't put Earth-colored Gloock headings against Teal or Forest backgrounds. The Two-Register Rule governs.
Don't make the site look like a generic spa: no stock candle photos, no cursive-on-beige, no teal used generically.
Don't use loud new-age aesthetics: no purple gradients, no heavy crystal imagery.
Don't build services as an identical card grid. Text-forward, always.
Don't open a modal as the first instinct for booking, newsletter, or contact.
Don't add a third typeface. Two fonts, no more.
Don't deploy Plum as a layout color, background, or text. The Plum Rule is absolute.
